source_or_gap: Pinned local Corben's Trainer project snapshot: typed training/evaluation control plane, retained run and evidence artifacts, and implementation gaps in seed identity, content pinning, benchmark authenticity, transitive revocation, and checkpoint acknowledgement.
chapter_action_policy: Use the project as a local implementation and negative-case reference across existing chapters. Do not add a training-control-plane chapter or promote support until Best Model mining, cross-project deduplication, independent literature, and claim-specific evidence review are complete.
merge_or_split_policy: Merge manifest compilation, artifact lineage, learning truth, benchmark authenticity, revocation, resource receipts, and campaign durability into their current chapter owners. Reconsider an epistemic-control-plane boundary only after the training kernel project and all intake projects are mined.
boundary_decision_rationale: The trainer unifies experiment governance, but its main mechanisms already have precise homes in evidence discipline, artifact graphs, benchmark ratchets, supply-chain provenance, self-improvement, resource economics, and project governance. A new chapter would duplicate those boundaries before the backend/kernel relationship is fully traced.
external_literature_need: experiment tracking and reproducible computational research
statistical independence, seed policy, and uncertainty for ML evaluation
benchmark contamination, benchmark governance, and public-claim authenticity
dataset lineage, content pinning, sample-level deduplication, and decontamination
model registries, promotion leases, quarantine, revocation, and rollback
crash consistency, append-only logs, asynchronous checkpoint acknowledgement, and recovery
proof_or_test_backlog: restore offline dependencies and reproduce the Rust workspace tests with build output outside the source tree
mutate an upstream benchmark fixture and prove automatic transitive invalidation through evidence, claim, promotion, and report state
prove that a missing actual seed cannot be replaced by run identity in a claim-bearing repetition
verify actual dataset bytes against the registered digest during preflight and reject ID fingerprints labeled as content checksums
add sample-level contamination fixtures that distinguish declaration coverage from empirical overlap detection
inject checkpoint failures before staging, during journal append, after blob insertion, and before completion acknowledgement
force campaign interruption and backup recovery while checking no lost, duplicated, or falsely completed stage
test database referential integrity and promotion labels bound to exact artifacts
evidence_transition_precondition: claim-specific source mapping with exact implementation and retained-artifact references
independent literature reviewed for every generalized design claim
authentic benchmark inputs and evaluator provenance established for any external performance statement
actual seed, source, config, dataset, model, environment, and evaluator identities present
accepted evidence transition record required for any support-state change
required_before_drafting: mine Corben's Best Model Possible and trace real backend-contract satisfaction
complete cross-project provenance and terminology deduplication
preserve distinctions between manifest presence, runtime enforcement, retained artifact, reproduced test, and external evidence
redact private paths, raw cases, weights, logs, and unpublished material
treat quarantined external-labelled runs as negative evidence only
promotion_blockers: workspace tests were not reproduced because an offline dependency was unavailable
all retained typed run seeds and code snapshots are null
external-labelled benchmark promotions depend on later-quarantined placeholder evidence
the retained promotion label was not transitively revoked and identifies no exact artifact
generic dataset preflight does not verify content bytes
overlap scanning validates declarations rather than sample contents
checkpoint worker completion is not fully acknowledged across all failure paths
independent literature and evaluator evidence remain incomplete
source-publication permission is not recorded for the raw project
residuals: real trainer-to-Best-Model backend behavior remains to be traced
benchmark authenticity coverage is uneven across registry assets
blind-holdout operational coverage is thin in the retained run corpus
journal compaction lacks a cryptographic prefix anchor
control-plane complexity and module-boundary debt remain
newly unzipped intake projects may repair, supersede, or duplicate these mechanisms
next_action: Mine Corben's Best Model Possible in equal depth, then rescan the intake directory and perform the cross-project provenance, contradiction, and chapter-insertion pass.
non_claims: does not claim model improvement or authentic external benchmark performance
does not treat run-ID diversity as independent seeds
does not treat registry declarations as content-level decontamination
does not claim the frontier corpus is independent, clean, or semantically diverse
does not claim crash-safe checkpointing, tamper-proof audit, production reliability, safety, AGI, or ASI
does not add a new chapter or promote an ASI Stack support state
